  <entry>
    <id>tag:github.com,2008:Repository/633927609/0.121.19</id>
    <updated>2026-07-14T16:33:34Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/releases/tag/0.121.19"/>
    <title>0.121.19</title>
    <content type="html"><h2><a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/compare/0.121.18...0.121.19">0.121.19</a> (2026-07-14)</h2>
<h3>Features</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>providers:</strong> add Bedrock GPT-5.6 frontier support (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/10081" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/10081/hovercard">#10081</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/a97c8ebf1d005d035c75692c9aa1518a3b75a4b6">a97c8eb</a>)</li>
<li><strong>providers:</strong> add Meta Model API (Muse Spark) provider (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/10041" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/10041/hovercard">#10041</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/e6f06da06093552eee2d09d0210fb3a960cf0304">e6f06da</a>)</li>
<li><strong>providers:</strong> add Open Interpreter provider (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/10079" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/10079/hovercard">#10079</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/c4d9028792fdfcbdc93350921f640cdeb1114c8d">c4d9028</a>)</li>
<li><strong>providers:</strong> add xAI Grok 4.5 support (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/10032" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/10032/hovercard">#10032</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/83cedf0f4cf096c3908d4abacae6dca511455d6f">83cedf0</a>)</li>
<li><strong>providers:</strong> honor CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR for Claude Code creds (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/9980" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/9980/hovercard">#9980</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/a643f8b8e13a93e89f1da229e3b77db3927bdf55">a643f8b</a>)</li>
<li><strong>providers:</strong> support GPT-5.6 GA (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/10040" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/10040/hovercard">#10040</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/32806255bfb2685ea8e01a72bca8420746ba341c">3280625</a>)</li>
<li><strong>redteam:</strong> account for generation-phase token usage (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/issues/9967" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/promptfoo/promptfoo/pull/9967/hovercard">#9967</a>) (<a href="https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/commit/e0d16984a3d627c252a4f1dce4ae9b5ffdd250f6">e0d1698</a>)</li>
<li><s
